title: `github.com/docker/docker/api/types.Info` is deprecated and is removed in docker v26
body:
### Issue Description

podman v5.0.0 uses a deprecated field in here

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/aaa6dc3cc6a670fd707e3188097207af5be4bd31/pkg/api/handlers/types.go#L77

it is removed in docker v26

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Upgrade to docker v26
2. Perform the build


### Describe the results you received

The build fails with

```
 github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/api/handlers
/root/go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/podman/v5@v5.0.0/pkg/api/handlers/types.go:77:9: undefined: docker.Info
```


### Describe the results you expected

Build succeeds.

### podman info output

```yaml
podman v5.0.0
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting
